name: ocas-corvus
description: Exploratory pattern analysis engine for the system knowledge graph. Use when the system needs to detect routines, emerging interests, anomalies, stalled threads, or cross-domain opportunities from accumulated activity signals. Trigger phrases: 'analyze my patterns', 'what routines has the system detected', 'run a deep exploration cycle', 'are there anomalies in my activity'. Do not use for web research (Sift), person investigations (Scout), or system architecture changes (Mentor).
author: Indigo Karasu
